---
title: "All Reviews"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-title: "On this page"
    code-tools: false
---

# 🛍️ Sydney Eco Product Reviews

<div class="review-hero">
  <p class="review-tagline">Lets move towards true goods and filter out all greenwashing with the power of community.</p>
  <p class="review-intro">Welcome to our community-powered review hub. Discover quick, trustworthy feedback from locals on eco-friendly products available in Sydney, then add your own review in under a minute.</p>
  <div class="review-actions">
    <a class="review-cta" href="https://tally.so/r/wdRZZq">Submit a quick review</a>
    <a class="review-secondary" href="#product-review-table">Browse community reviews</a>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="review-qr-card">
  <a href="https://tally.so/r/wdRZZq">
    <img src="https://api.qrserver.com/v1/create-qr-code/?size=180x180&data=https%3A%2F%2Ftally.so%2Fr%2FwdRZZq" alt="QR code for the review form">
  </a>
  <p class="review-qr-title">Scan to submit your review</p>
  <p class="review-qr-copy">Fast feedback from your phone helps keep the table current.</p>
</div>

> 🌿 Want to share your thoughts? [Submit a quick review](https://tally.so/r/wdRZZq)

## 📊 Product Review Table

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| layout-ncol: 1

library(DT)

reviews <- read.csv("reviews.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)

rename_map <- c(
  "Name" = "Product",
  "Total Rating" = "Rating",
  "Recommend" = "Recommended",
  "Reccommend" = "Recommended"
)

matched_names <- intersect(names(rename_map), names(reviews))
if (length(matched_names) > 0) {
  names(reviews)[match(matched_names, names(reviews))] <- rename_map[matched_names]
}

preferred_columns <- c("Timestamp", "Category", "Brand", "Product", "Rating", "Recommended", "Comment")
if ("Status" %in% names(reviews)) {
  reviews <- reviews[trimws(reviews$Status) == "Approved", , drop = FALSE]
}

reviews <- reviews[, intersect(preferred_columns, names(reviews)), drop = FALSE]

datatable(
  reviews,
  extensions = 'Buttons',
  options = list(
    pageLength = 10,
    autoWidth = TRUE,
    scrollX = TRUE,
    dom = 'Bfrtip',
    buttons = c('copy', 'csv', 'excel', 'pdf', 'print')
  ),
  rownames = FALSE,
  filter = "top",
  class = "stripe hover"
)
```

## 🧭 Explore More
- 📚 [Read in-depth product blogs](blog/index.qmd)
- 🛒 [See what's trending locally](#)
